notes: v0.29.5 — Live SHOP rebuilt as CATEGORY HUB (the mockup you picked). Left sidebar = 5 animated category tiles, each with its own animation themed to the category content: SHIP SKINS = slow rotating triangle ship, PROJECTILES = mini ship parked + bullet looping right, TRAILS = ship gliding L→R with a trail trailing behind, BOSS KEYS = rotating octagon key, BOOSTERS = pulsing lightning bolt (soon). Right pane = 4-column grid of animated cards. Ship cards rotate the actual procedural ship 360° around the preview centre. Projectile cards show a SHARD ASH stand-in ship firing the catalog projectile rightward in a loop, with a fading trail behind the bullet — all 16 shapes read as real ammo. Trail cards show a SHARD ASH ship gliding L→R with the catalog's actual trail kind streaming behind it (all 16 trail kinds). PROJECTILES + TRAILS promoted to first-class tabs (no more COSMETICS sub-tab indirection). Buy/equip flow + toast intact.
